$description: deepdive-rehearsal design tokens in W3C DTCG format. Demonstrates the 3-tier architecture the mature systems (Fluent 2 global/alias/component, Material 3 ref/sys) all share: PRIMITIVES -> SEMANTIC. Compiled to CSS custom properties by Style Dictionary. Only the two audited gaps (typography, z-index) are modelled here; the app's superior palette/shadows/spacing stay as-is.

font.$description: primitive font-size ramp -- 9 steps, collapsing the app's 40 ad-hoc sizes

font-weight.$description: kept fine-grained on purpose -- the app uses a variable font (640/720 are real weights Open Props' 100-steps can't express)

font-size.$description: SEMANTIC type scale -- roles (Material 3 taxonomy), aliased to primitives. 7 roles replace 40 ad-hoc sizes.

z.$description: SEMANTIC z-index tiers -- 7 named layers replacing 20 ad-hoc values (9999/1202/...). Open Props' --layer-1..5 could not express these overlay tiers.
